sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69621" key="mwropo/nhros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μωρο-πόνηρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n69621.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stupidly wicked</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Adam.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.58</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1617.tlg001:68" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polem.Phgn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">68</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
